title: lopholaena coriifolia
intro: Lopholaena coriifolia is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the bushy or coral-leafed lopholaena. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Lopholaena coriifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds, as well as providing relief from digestive problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and topical creams, with the roots and leaves often used separately or in combination to harness its medicinal properties.
